svg.title: Demo B2: LiteLLM virtual keys — model routing across three LLM vendors
svg.text: Demo B2 · LiteLLM virtual keys — model routing across vendors
One gateway. Three LLM vendors. Virtual key controls which model each app can reach.
Docker host · one compose.yml, three services
• never sees real vendor API keys
① AUTH — does this key exist? revoked?
② MODEL — is this model allowed?
# flip model access — no restart needed
same inbound key — three different outbound auth dialects
The virtual key IS the identity — change models list via API → policy takes effect instantly, no restart needed
Bundle 1 · Layer B · Slot B2 — Virtual keys: LiteLLM + Postgres + model routing
